# RevenueCat Proof

This file is the human-readable companion to `revenue/revenuecat-proof.json`.
The JSON file is generated by the live probe (`probe:revenuecat`). This Markdown
stub is for the founder to record sandbox purchase and entitlement evidence that
cannot be captured automatically via the API.

Status: pending until probe runs and sandbox evidence is recorded below.

## Machine Probe (auto-generated)

The live probe writes `revenue/revenuecat-proof.json`.
Run:

```
doppler run -- npm run probe:revenuecat
```

The artifact records offering ID, package IDs, entitlement IDs, HTTP statuses,
and a `probe: "revenuecat@1"` fingerprint. Review the output before filling in
the manual section below.

## Manual Evidence (founder must fill in)

### Sandbox Purchase

<!-- Record date, simulator/device, iOS version, product purchased, result. -->

Date tested: <!-- e.g. 2026-01-15 -->

Device / simulator: <!-- e.g. iPhone 16 simulator, iOS 18.2 -->

Product purchased: <!-- e.g. com.app.premium.annual -->

Result: <!-- sandbox purchase succeeded / failed — describe what happened -->

### Entitlement Granted Inside App

<!-- Confirm the entitlement unlocked the premium content inside the app,
     not just that a purchase event appeared in the RevenueCat dashboard. -->

Entitlement name: <!-- e.g. premium -->

Confirmed granted inside app: <!-- yes / no — describe how you verified -->

### Restore Purchases Tested

<!-- Confirm the restore path was exercised and did not grant a duplicate entitlement. -->

Restore result: <!-- succeeded without duplicate / describe any issue -->

### Release Build Confirmed

<!-- Confirm the offering resolves non-empty packages in a Release-scheme build
     (not just in a debug/preview seeded build). -->

Release build tested: <!-- yes / no -->

Scheme used: <!-- Release / TestFlight / other -->

currentOffering non-empty in Release: <!-- yes / no -->

## DoD Sign-off

<!-- Mark this section complete only when the probe JSON exists, all manual
     evidence above is filled in, and the founder has reviewed the artifact. -->

Founder reviewed and approved: <!-- yes / no / pending -->

Date approved: <!-- ISO date -->
